model_phrasing: gpt-5 family detected from the system prompt; Phrasing profile id RTM-PH6OCQ6MX4

frame.objective: Validate or reject the DKR-P10A throughput-stability checkpoint without judgement.

allowed: Read and replay the DKR-P10A scratch evidence once.
forbidden: Edit files, fix findings, rerun until green, optimize product code, compare a candidate, merge, release, publish, deploy, or push.

frame.human_confirmation_boundary: Only the human may change thresholds or authority.

assignment: Run exactly one replay of DKR-P10A. Verify frozen and raw hashes, exact P9 archive/build/workload provenance, 14-process balanced schedule per row, seven timed blocks per process, archive medians, every 0.80 to 1.25 A/A ratio, and every 0.80 to 1.25 median stationarity ratio. Reject broader product-performance or optimization-authority claims.
budget_and_stop_rule: One replay, 10 minutes. Stop at the first deterministic result.
hand_back_rule: Return rejected for missing, stale, contradicted, non-replayable, or wrong-source evidence. Do not repair.
output_schema: Use the exact audit-trace blocks from references/roles/validator.md and save one immutable verification file under /tmp.
required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
